title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to embodied cognitive science and cognitive robotics, How
cognition works, Considerations for  Modelling Cognitive Systems
Cognition and intelligence, Intelligent architecture: Theories of intelligence,
Kuramoto model, Child-Robot interaction. Levels of Abstraction in
Modelling Cognitive Systems.

title: Module 2
content:
Overview, perspective of cognitive architecture, Desirable features,
Designing a Cognitive Architecture. Introduction to the model of cognition,
visual perception and recognition, Machine learning, soft computing tools,
and robot cognition.

title: Module 3
content:
Necessity for 3D Reconstruction – Building Perception – ImagingGeometry
– Global Representation – Transformation to Global Co-ordinate System.
Map building: 2D world map, data structure for map building, Explanation
of map building, procedure traverse boundary, robot simulation and robot
map building programming.

title: Module 4
content:
Robot Programming Methods: Program for Sensor Reading Display,
Program for Avoid-Obstacles Behavior, Program for Wandering Within the
Workspace,  Program for Tele-operation. A Complete Program for
autonomous mobile robots.
